ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Your Todoist API token (Settings > Integrations > Developer in Todoist)
ast.target: 您的 Todoist API 令牌（Todoist 中的 设置 > 集成 > 开发者）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Select the default project for new tasks
ast.target: 选择新任务的默认项目

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow syncing the same task multiple times to Todoist
ast.target: 允许将同一任务多次同步到 Todoist

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Allow syncing a task from Obsidian to Todoist again after its previous instance was marked as completed in Todoist
ast.target: 允许在 Todoist 中将任务标记为完成后，再次从 Obsidian 同步该任务到 Todoist

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When no due date is specified in the task, automatically set it to today when syncing to Todoist
ast.target: 当任务中未指定截止日期时，同步到 Todoist 时自动设置为今天

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: When creating a task from a non-task (e.g., note or textselection), default the due date to today.
ast.target: 从非任务（例如笔记或文本选择）创建任务时，默认截止日期为今天。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Show a warning when setting a due date in the past
ast.target: 设置过去日期的截止日期时显示警告

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key for due dates in Dataview format (e.g., "due" for [due::YYYY-MM-DD])
ast.target: Dataview 格式中截止日期的键（例如，[due::YYYY-MM-DD] 中的 \"due\"）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Enable support for Tasks plugin due date format (📅 YYYY-MM-DD)
ast.target: 启用对 Tasks 插件截止日期格式（📅 YYYY-MM-DD）的支持

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which format takes priority when both Tasks and Dataview due dates are present in a task
ast.target: 当任务中同时存在 Tasks 和 Dataview 截止日期时，选择哪种格式优先

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Priority level assigned to tasks when syncing to Todoist if no priority is specified
ast.target: 同步到 Todoist 时，如果未指定优先级，则分配给任务的优先级级别

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key used to specify task priority in Dataview format (e.g., 'p' for [p::1] or [p::high])
ast.target: 用于在 Dataview 格式中指定任务优先级的键（例如，[p::1] 或 [p::high] 中的 'p'）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which format takes priority when both Dataview and Tasks plugin priorities are present in a task
ast.target: 当任务中同时存在 Dataview 和 Tasks 插件优先级时，选择哪种格式优先

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Key name in frontmatter for storing the note ID (requires Advanced URI plugin)
ast.target: frontmatter 中用于存储笔记 ID 的键名（需要 Advanced URI 插件）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format for generating block IDs (uses moment.js formatting)
ast.target: 生成块 ID 的格式（使用 moment.js 格式化）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how the creation timestamp appears after the Todoist link in Obsidian. This timestamp is added after the Todoist task link to show when the task was synced. Uses moment.js format (e.g., [📝 ]YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm)
ast.target: 自定义 Todoist 链接后在 Obsidian 中显示的创建时间戳。此时间戳在 Todoist 任务链接后添加，以显示任务同步时间。使用 moment.js 格式（例如，[📝 ]YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose which type of Todoist links to insert under the Obsidian task when syncing tasks from Todoist.
ast.target: 选择从 Todoist 同步任务时，在 Obsidian 任务下方插入哪种类型的 Todoist 链接。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Customize how the creation timestamp appears in the task description's metadata section in Todoist. This timestamp is added after the reference link to show when the task was synced. Uses moment.js format (e.g., [📝 ]YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm)
ast.target: 自定义任务描述的元数据部分中创建时间戳的显示方式。此时间戳在参考链接之后添加，用于显示任务同步时间。使用 moment.js 格式（例如，[📝 ]YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm）

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Format Obsidian links in Todoist task descriptions as Markdown links instead of plain text. For example, [Original task in Obsidian](obsidian://url) instead of Original task in Obsidian: obsidian://url
ast.target: 将 Todoist 任务描述中的 Obsidian 链接格式化为 Markdown 链接，而非纯文本。例如，[Obsidian 中的原始任务](obsidian://url) 而非 Obsidian 中的原始任务: obsidian://url

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Include text of the current line in the Todoist task description when creating a new Todoist task from text
ast.target: 从文本创建新的 Todoist 任务时，在任务描述中包含当前行的文本

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Automatically add a tag to the task in Obsidian when it is synced to Todoist. The tag helps track synced tasks in Obsidian only and won't appear in Todoist
ast.target: 任务同步到 Todoist 时，自动在 Obsidian 中为该任务添加标签。此标签仅用于在 Obsidian 中跟踪已同步的任务，不会出现在 Todoist 中

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Tag to add to the task in Obsidian for tracking (without the # symbol). Only letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores are allowed.
ast.target: 在 Obsidian 中为跟踪任务而添加的标签（不带 # 符号）。仅允许使用字母、数字、连字符和下划线。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Choose when to show notifications for sync operations. 'All' shows notifications for both successful syncs and errors. 'Errors only' shows notifications only when sync operations fail. 'None' suppresses all sync notifications.
ast.target: 选择何时显示同步操作的通知。'全部' 会显示成功同步和错误的通知。'仅错误' 仅在同步操作失败时显示通知。'无' 会抑制所有同步通知。

ast.name: setDesc
ast.source: Override notification preference specifically for mobile devices. Leave as 'Same as desktop' to use the same setting as above, or choose a different preference for mobile use.
ast.target: 专门针对移动设备覆盖通知偏好设置。保留为 '与桌面端相同' 以使用上述相同设置，或为移动使用选择不同的偏好设置。

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 允许重新同步已完成的 Todoist 任务

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set today as default due date
ast.target: 将今天设为默认截止日期

ast.name: setName
ast.source: Set today as default due date for non-task case
ast.target: 为非任务情况将今天设为默认截止日期

ast.target: 对过期截止日期发出警告

ast.name: setName
ast.target: 启用 Tasks 插件截止日期

ast.source: Enter Dataview keys, separated by commas

ast.name: setText
ast.source: The due date you entered is in the past.
ast.target: 您输入的截止日期已过期。

ast.name: setText
ast.source: Would you like to proceed with creating the task or edit the due date?
ast.target: 您希望继续创建任务还是编辑截止日期？

ast.name: warn
ast.source: TodoistApi constructor with baseUrl as second parameter is deprecated. Use options object instead: new TodoistApi(token, { baseUrl, customFetch })
ast.target: TodoistApi 构造函数将 baseUrl 作为第二个参数的方式已弃用。请改用选项对象：new TodoistApi(token, { baseUrl, customFetch })

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Advanced URI plugin is configured to use file paths instead of UIDs. This may cause issues if file paths change.
ast.target: Advanced URI 插件配置为使用文件路径而非 UID。如果文件路径更改，这可能会导致问题。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to check project sharing status:
ast.target: 检查项目共享状态失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Failed to create or get Todoist label:
ast.target: 创建或获取 Todoist 标签失败：

ast.name: warn
ast.source: Invalid Todoist label format. Label will not be added to the task.
ast.target: 无效的 Todoist 标签格式。标签将不会添加到任务中。

ast.name: warn
ast.source: No Todoist API instance available, cannot fetch v2 ID
ast.target: 没有可用的 Todoist API 实例，无法获取 v2 ID

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid date format. Please use YYYY-MM-DD[THH:mm] or relative format (e.g., 1d, +2d)
ast.target: 无效的日期格式。请使用 YYYY-MM-DD[THH:mm] 或相对格式（例如，1d, +2d）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Task due date is in the past. Consider updating it before syncing.
ast.target: 任务截止日期已过期。建议在同步前更新它。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid Todoist token. Please check and try again.
ast.target: 无效的 Todoist 令牌。请检查并重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate or retrieve UID for the note.
ast.target: 为笔记生成或检索 UID 失败。

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 未找到活动 Markdown 视图

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No editor found in the active view
ast.target: 在活动视图中未找到编辑器

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to update frontmatter with UUID
ast.target: 使用 UUID 更新 frontmatter 失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid relative date format. Please use format like: 0d, 1d, +2d
ast.target: 无效的相对日期格式。请使用如下格式：0d, 1d, +2d

ast.name: Notice
ast.source:
Invalid date format. Please use:
- Absolute dates: YYYY-MM-DD or YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm (e.g., 2024-12-31 or 2024-12-31T15:00)
- Relative dates: 0d (today), 1d (tomorrow), +2d (in 2 days)
ast.target: 无效的日期格式。请使用：\n- 绝对日期：YYYY-MM-DD 或 YYYY-MM-DDTHH:mm（例如，2024-12-31 或 2024-12-31T15:00）\n- 相对日期：0d（今天），1d（明天），+2d（2 天后）

ast.name: Notice
ast.target: 加载 Todoist 项目失败

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: Failed to add label to task. The task will be created without the label.
ast.target: 警告：为任务添加标签失败。任务将在没有标签的情况下创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Warning: Invalid Todoist label format. The task will be created without the label.
ast.target: 警告：无效的 Todoist 标签格式。任务将在没有标签的情况下创建。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set up your Todoist API token in settings
ast.target: 请在设置中配置您的 Todoist API 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please place the cursor on a task line (e.g., "- [ ] Task")
ast.target: 请将光标放在任务行上（例如，\"- [ ] 任务\"）

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This task is already completed in Obsidian. Only open tasks can be synced.
ast.target: 此任务在 Obsidian 中已完成。只有未完成的任务才能同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This task has a special status (e.g., [?], [/], [-]). Only open tasks can be synced.
ast.target: 此任务具有特殊状态（例如，[?], [/], [-]）。只有未完成的任务才能同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid tag name. Tags can only contain letters, numbers, hyphens, and underscores.
ast.target: 无效的标签名称。标签只能包含字母、数字、连字符和下划线。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Task already exists in Todoist and is completed. Re-syncing completed tasks is disabled.
ast.target: 任务已存在于 Todoist 中且已完成。已禁用重新同步已完成的任务。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Task already exists in Todoist. Enable duplicate tasks in settings to sync again.
ast.target: 任务已存在于 Todoist 中。在设置中启用重复任务以再次同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please set up your Todoist API token first.
ast.target: 请先配置您的 Todoist API 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to generate reference link. Please check Advanced URI plugin settings.
ast.target: 生成参考链接失败。请检查 Advanced URI 插件设置。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create Todoist task. Please check your settings and try again.
ast.target: 创建 Todoist 任务失败。请检查您的设置并重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: An error occurred. Please try again.

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to insert Todoist link. Please try again.
ast.target: 插入 Todoist 链接失败。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: No linked Todoist task found for this task.
ast.target: 未找到此任务关联的 Todoist 任务。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Could not find the task in Todoist. It might have been deleted.
ast.target: 在 Todoist 中找不到该任务。它可能已被删除。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: This task is already completed in Todoist.
ast.target: 此任务在 Todoist 中已完成。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Only metadata found in the task description. Nothing to sync.
ast.target: 任务描述中仅找到元数据。无需同步。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to sync Todoist description. Please try again.
ast.target: 同步 Todoist 描述失败。请重试。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to create a block ID for the task. The link will be added but might not work properly.
ast.target: 为任务创建块 ID 失败。链接将被添加，但可能无法正常工作。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please enter a Todoist task link or ID
ast.target: 请输入 Todoist 任务链接或 ID

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Invalid Todoist task link or ID. Please check your input.
ast.target: 无效的 Todoist 任务链接或 ID。请检查您的输入。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Todoist API not initialized. Please check your API token in settings.
ast.target: Todoist API 未初始化。请在设置中检查您的 API 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Task not found. Please check if the task exists and you have access to it.
ast.target: 任务未找到。请检查任务是否存在以及您是否有访问权限。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Error syncing task. Check the console for details.
ast.target: 同步任务时出错。请检查控制台了解详情。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Please configure your Todoist API token in settings first
ast.target: 请先在设置中配置您的 Todoist API 令牌

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Failed to load Todoist projects. Please check your API token.
ast.target: 加载 Todoist 项目失败。请检查您的 API 令牌。

ast.name: Notice
ast.source: Advanced URI plugin is required but not installed. Please install and enable it first.
ast.target: 需要 Advanced URI 插件，但未安装。请先安装并启用它。

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync task from Todoist to Obsidian
ast.target: 从 Todoist 同步任务到 Obsidian

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create Todoist task from selected text
ast.target: 从选定文本创建 Todoist 任务

ast.name: name
ast.source: Create Todoist task linked to current note
ast.target: 创建链接到当前笔记的 Todoist 任务

ast.name: name
ast.target: 从 Todoist 任务同步描述

ast.name: name
ast.source: Sync full description from Todoist task (including metadata)
ast.target: 从 Todoist 任务同步完整描述（包括元数据）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Note: Do not include spaces or the # symbol in the tag name.
ast.target: 注意：标签名称中不要包含空格或 # 符号。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Can contain letters, numbers, spaces, and underscores
ast.target: 可包含字母、数字、空格和下划线

ast.name: text
ast.source: Cannot contain special characters like @, #, !, etc.
ast.target: 不能包含特殊字符，如 @, #, ! 等。

ast.name: text
ast.target: 长度必须在 1 到 60 个字符之间

ast.name: text
ast.source: Spaces at the start/end will be trimmed
ast.target: 开头/结尾的空格将被修剪

ast.name: text
ast.source: Invalid label name. Labels can only contain letters, numbers, spaces, and underscores, and must be between 1 and 60 characters.
ast.target: 标签名称无效。标签只能包含字母、数字、空格和下划线，且长度必须在 1 到 60 个字符之间。

ast.name: text
ast.source: See documentation for the complete list of patterns
ast.target: 请参阅文档获取完整的模式列表

ast.name: text
ast.source: Enter absolute dates in Dataview format, e.g., 2025-01-01, 2025-01-01T12:00.
ast.target: 以 Dataview 格式输入绝对日期，例如 2025-01-01, 2025-01-01T12:00。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Or use relative dates, e.g., 0d (today), 1d (tomorrow), +2d (in 2 days). Relative dates can skip weekends if enabled below.
ast.target: 或使用相对日期，例如 0d（今天）、1d（明天）、+2d（2 天后）。如果下方启用，相对日期可以跳过周末。

ast.name: text
ast.source: Skip weekends when calculating the due date (recommended for work tasks)
ast.target: 计算截止日期时跳过周末（推荐用于工作任务）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Priority values are mapped according to your settings
ast.target: 优先级值根据您的设置进行映射

ast.name: text
ast.source: Select a project for the task (defaults to setting)
ast.target: 为任务选择一个项目（默认为设置值）

ast.name: text
ast.source: A reference link back to this note
ast.target: 指向此笔记的参考链接

ast.name: text
ast.target: 同步 Todoist 任务到 Obsidian

ast.name: text
ast.target: Todoist 任务链接或 ID（必填）

ast.name: text
ast.source: Paste a Todoist task link (e.g. https://app.todoist.com/app/task/task-name-id) or just the task ID
ast.target: 粘贴 Todoist 任务链接（例如 https://app.todoist.com/app/task/task-name-id）或仅任务 ID

ast.name: text
ast.source: The following details will be imported:

ast.name: text
ast.source: Link to the original Todoist task
ast.target: 指向原始 Todoist 任务的链接

ast.name: text
ast.source: The task will be formatted according to your settings (Dataview or Tasks plugin).
ast.target: 任务将根据您的设置进行格式化（Dataview 或 Tasks 插件）。
